action_set_definitions.name: get_portfolio_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current cash balance and all asset holdings in the portfolio.

action_set_definitions.name: get_market_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current market prices for assets and the valuation of the liability proxy.

symbols.description: List of asset symbols or proxies to price.

action_set_definitions.name: get_risk_analytics
action_set_definitions.description: Calculates PV01 (Present Value of a Basis Point) for the current assets, the liability, and the specific trade instrument.

instrument_symbol.description: The symbol of the instrument to calculate unit-level PV01 for (e.g., '30Y_SONIA_SWAPS').

action_set_definitions.name: get_collateral_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Calculates the current and projected collateral buffer in basis points (bps) based on liquid holdings and liability exposure.

simulated_trade_impact.description: Optional: Estimated change in cash/liquidity from a planned trade to project post-trade buffer.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_trade
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a trade for a specific asset. Restricted from certain assets by policy.

units.description: The number of units to buy (positive) or sell (negative).

state_description.cash_balance: The amount of liquid currency available in the account for purchasing assets.
state_description.portfolio_holdings: A mapping of asset symbols to the number of units/shares currently held.
state_description.market_prices: The current market price for each trackable asset symbol.
state_description.transaction_count: Total number of successful trades executed since initialization.
state_description.last_updated_timestamp: The internal environment clock timestamp in ISO 8601 format.
